titlestmt.titleproper: New York State College of Human Ecology Office of Student Services records23-11-2679
titlestmt.author: Keating, Eileen

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2025-09-09 00:00:41 UTC.
profiledesc.langusage: Description is written in: Undetermined, Code for undetermined script script.

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: New York State College of Human Ecology Office of Student Services records

origination.label: Creator
origination.corpname: New York State College of Human Ecology. Office of Student Services

accessrestrict.head: Restrictions on Access
accessrestrict.p: Only records of deceased alumni are open for research.

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Lists of students by class year.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: New York State College of Human Ecology Office of Student Services records, #23-11-2679. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

New York State College of Human Ecology
